steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the function of the underlined sentence, which does two things: states Green and Jutfelt's conclusion about ocean acidification, and notes their sample size limitation.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'lists traits of Scyliorhinus canicula': no traits are listed in the sentence. ✗
  • Choice B — 'emphasizes where the study was conducted': location is never mentioned. ✗
  • Choice C — 'presents a criticism of their results': the limitation is methodological, not a criticism of the conclusion itself; Clements raises that later. ✗
  • Choice D — 'states the conclusion reached by Green and Jutfelt': the sentence opens by stating their published conclusion. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
